home.title: The Best Invoicing App
home.subtitle: for Freelancers & Small Businesses
home.desc: The easiest way to create professional invoices — design, track payments, and export to PDF in seconds.

features.title: Fast Invoicing
features.desc: Create your invoice in seconds with an easy interface

features.title: PDF Export
features.desc: Professional invoice template ready to print and share

features.title: Perfect for Small Biz
features.desc: Complete system to manage your financial receivables

hero.title: Create professional invoices and quotations in minutes
hero.desc: Invoicaty helps freelancers and small businesses create invoices and quotations with support for 197 countries, 155 currencies, tax configuration, and a full Arabic-English experience.
hero.supporting: Built for freelancers, creators, consultants, and small businesses

problem.title: Manual invoicing slows serious work down
points: Business details get repeated over and over across scattered files.
Creating quotations and invoices manually takes time you should spend on clients.
Tracking paid, unpaid, and cancelled documents becomes messy very quickly.
Documents often look inconsistent, which weakens your professional impression.

solution.title: Invoicaty keeps your document flow organized
solution.desc: From your first quotation to your final invoice, Invoicaty gives you one polished place to create, convert, print, share, and track business documents without unnecessary friction.

features.title: Send your invoice professionally in one minute
features.desc: These are not filler features. They solve the practical steps independent businesses go through every day.
features.shortDesc: A focused invoicing workflow with the features most businesses actually need.

items.title: Create invoices quickly
items.desc: Generate polished invoices in minutes with the details your clients expect.
items.shortDesc: Build clean invoices fast with the details clients expect.

items.title: Create professional quotations
items.desc: Prepare clear quotations before approval with the same structured workflow.
items.shortDesc: Send structured quotations before moving to invoicing.

items.title: Convert quotations into invoices
items.desc: Once a quotation is accepted, turn it into an invoice without starting over.
items.shortDesc: Turn approved quotations into invoices without redoing the work.

items.title: 197 countries, 155 currencies, and tax support
items.desc: Adapt your setup to your country, default currency, and tax requirements with built-in support for 197 countries and 155 currencies.
items.shortDesc: Choose from 197 countries, 155 currencies, and configure taxes for your business.

items.title: Arabic and English experience
items.desc: Use the platform in both Arabic and English with a bilingual product flow.
items.shortDesc: Switch between Arabic and English with a bilingual product flow.

items.title: Templates, printing, and PDF-ready output
items.desc: Present your invoices and quotations in a clean format that is easy to print and share.
items.shortDesc: Use polished templates that are ready to print and share as PDFs.

workflow.title: From quotation to invoice with less back-and-forth
workflow.desc: Invoicaty helps you handle the full path from proposal to payment in one smoother workflow.
workflow.shortDesc: Create the quotation, convert it to an invoice, then track what happens next.

steps.title: Create a quotation
steps.desc: Prepare a professional quotation with clear pricing, project details, and structure.
steps.shortDesc: Start with a clear, client-ready quotation.

steps.title: Share and update it easily
steps.desc: Make changes quickly and keep the client-facing document tidy and professional.
steps.shortDesc: Update the document quickly while keeping it polished.

steps.title: Convert it into an invoice
steps.desc: After approval, generate the invoice directly from the quotation details.
steps.shortDesc: Move from quotation to invoice without starting over.

steps.title: Track payment and document status
steps.desc: Stay on top of paid, unpaid, cancelled, and archived records without confusion.
steps.shortDesc: See what is paid, pending, cancelled, or archived at a glance.

global.title: Built for your business wherever you work
global.desc: Whether you serve clients locally or internationally, Invoicaty helps you configure the business details that matter for your workflow.
items: Ready for local and international clients

output.title: Send documents that reflect the quality of your work
output.desc: Your quotation or invoice should not look like an afterthought. Invoicaty helps you produce cleaner client-facing documents with better structure, branding, and presentation.
output.shortDesc: Make every quotation and invoice look clean, branded, and client-ready.
points: Brand color, logo, and business details

modern.title: Modern template
modern.desc: Clean structure with a sharp branded accent and strong readability.

classic.title: Classic template
classic.desc: A more formal presentation for businesses that prefer a timeless look.

minimal.title: Minimal template
minimal.desc: Simple and focused, ideal when clarity matters more than decoration.

audience.title: Made for service-based work
audience.desc: If your business depends on sending quotations or invoices to clients, Invoicaty is designed for the way you actually work.

faq.title: Everything people usually ask before signing up

items.a: Yes. Invoicaty includes quotation creation so you can prepare professional offers before issuing invoices.

items.q: Can I convert a quotation into an invoice?
items.a: Yes. Once the quotation is approved, you can convert it into an invoice instead of rebuilding the document from scratch.

items.q: Does it support currencies and taxes?
items.a: Yes. You can configure default currencies and tax settings to match your business needs.

items.q: Is it suitable for different countries?
items.a: Yes. Invoicaty includes support for 197 countries and 155 currencies, so you can choose the country that fits your business, set a default currency, and configure tax rates for more accurate invoices and quotations across local and international work.

items.q: Does it support Arabic and English?
items.a: Yes. The platform supports both Arabic and English for a bilingual product experience.

items.q: Can I print and share documents easily?
items.a: Yes. Invoices and quotations are designed to be print-friendly and easy to share as polished documents.

finalCta.title: Create invoices and quotations with a workflow that feels more professional
finalCta.desc: Save time, stay organized, and present your business with documents that look clear, polished, and client-ready.

mockup.quotationDesc: Create your offer, adjust it quickly, then convert it into an invoice once the client confirms.
